---
title: "Four Short Poems"
subtitle: "Contemporary lyrics by Laila Amara."
description: "A suite of four brief meditations on memory, migration, and the grammar of home."
author: "Mehdi Khribch"
date: "2026-04-03"
categories: [Poetry]
image: https://picsum.photos/seed/rrb-four-poems/1200/800
image-alt: "Placeholder"
---

### I.

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet,
consectetur adipiscing elit.
The river at first light —
a slow brass bell of water.

Sed do eiusmod tempor
incididunt ut labore
et dolore magna aliqua.

### II.

Ut enim ad minim veniam,
quis nostrud exercitation.
A heron steps once.
Then once again. Then is gone.

Duis aute irure dolor
in reprehenderit
in voluptate velit esse.

### III.

Excepteur sint occaecat
cupidatat non proident.
The small stones remember
the shape of the old tide.

Sunt in culpa qui
officia deserunt
mollit anim id est laborum.

---

*Placeholder verse (lorem ipsum). Replace with your poems when ready.*
